doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The California State Bar does not have an "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol" or "EAJP certification" program, and paralegals cannot draft court filings or perform legal tasks without direct attorney supervision under California law, reg
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The California State Bar does not have an "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol" or "EAJP certification" program, and paralegals cannot draft court filings or perform legal tasks without direct attorney supervision under California law, regardless of any purported waiver of Business & Professions Code §6125.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The California State Bar does not have an "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol" or "EAJP certification" program, and paralegals cannot draft court filings or perform legal tasks without direct attorney supervision under California law, regardless of any purported waiver of Business & Professions Code §6125.
